steps.title: Substitute the time
steps.content: The equation $d=30t$ gives the distance $d$ after $t$ seconds. For $2$ seconds, substitute $t=2$: $$d=30(2).$$

steps.title: Compute the distance
steps.content: $30(2)=60$, so the bus is $60$ feet from the marker after $2$ seconds. Choice A (‘$30$’) is the $1$-second distance, and choice D (‘$90$’) is the $3$-second distance. C is correct.
